rewards.description: 2XKO is a free 2v2 fighting game featuring the iconic champions from League of Legends. To celebrate Evo 2026—the biggest fighting game event of the year—we're kicking off a Twitch Drop campaign featuring special in-game rewards. Link your Riot Account to Twitch, then watch any stream in the 2XKO category for 30 minutes to unlock Pool Party-themed avatar items. Earn Darius's Life Vest (June 26-29), Caitlyn's Sun Hat (June 27-29), and Ahri's Lifeguard Visor (June 28-29). Collect them all!
rewards.name: 2XKO Evo 2026

rewards.description:
Tune into RF Online Next streams and get special rewards!  "The more you watch, the better the rewards!"

◎ During the event period, you can participate in the Drops Event by watching streams under the [RF Online Next] category on Twitch. 
◎ Please link your Twitch account with the Netmarble account you wish to receive rewards with.
* Once you have claimed your first reward, the Netmarble account linked to your Twitch account cannot be changed.
◎ Drops rewards can be claimed from your Twitch Drops inventory. Rewards not claimed from this website within 30 days of acquisition will expire and be deleted. Please make sure to claim your rewards within the specified timeframe.
◎ Drops rewards that have been successfully issued from this page can be claimed in-game by logging into [RF Online Next] and navigating to "Mail" → "Account."
* Once items have been issued, they cannot be reissued or claimed more than once.
rewards.name: RF ONLINE NEXT Drops

rewards.description: 🎮 Announcing Kakele Online's Epic Twitch Drops!  Embark on a unique journey in Kakele's realm. Dive into mystical lands, conquer quests, and enjoy our exciting Twitch Drops for enhanced gaming. Unlock rewards, including teleports, herbs, potions, and materials.  🕒 Timed Rewards: Enjoy cities Teleports, Ultra potions, Gold Refiner Kits and collect Dog Cards and Trophies.  💰 Prosperity Path: Gain Copper, Tin, Silver, Iron, Gold, Life Herbs, Mana Herbs for success. Accumulate Reputation Coins.  🎈 Grand Finale: End with an exclusive Twitch Drop and Bacon Extravaganza surprise! Link accounts, watch streams, and claim rewards for an unforgettable RPG experience.  🌟 How to Join:  Link Accounts: Connect your account and Twitch in the game app. Watch Streams: Tune in during to your favorite Kakele streamer. Claim Rewards: Receive Twitch Drop notifications claim in the game app.  Influencers: To enable drops on your stream, email us!  Don't miss the chance to enrich your journey with Twitch Drops!
rewards.name: Kakele Online - June 2.0

Welcome to Discover Fishing Planet Twitch Drops Campaign! 

Take your community on a discovery journey across Fishing Planet, starting from beginner-friendly waters and progressing toward more advanced destinations! Players can earn valuable rewards just by watching your streams: Pond Passes to 9 locations, baits, extra Credits, Baitcoins, Marker and Navigation Buoys, and Repair Kits. All you need to do is stream under the Fishing Planet tag and let your viewers enjoy the rewards!
